tests.name: protocol.valid_bacnet
tests.test_description: Can valid BACnet traffic be seen
tests.expected_behavior: BACnet traffic can be seen on the network and packets are valid and not malformed
recommendations: Inspect network traffic for malformed packets or checksum errors
Verify that the MTU settings are consistent across the network path

tests.name: protocol.bacnet.version
tests.test_description: Obtain the version of BACnet client used
tests.expected_behavior: The BACnet client implements an up to date version of BACnet
recommendations: Inspect network traffic for malformed packets or checksum errors
Ensure the device supports the required ASHRAE 135 protocol revision

tests.name: protocol.valid_modbus
tests.test_description: Can valid Modbus traffic be seen
tests.expected_behavior: Any Modbus functionality works as expected and valid Modbus traffic can be observed
recommendations: Set Default Unit ID (Ensure Slave ID matches test config, usually 1)
Populate Modbus Map (Ensure there are readable registers defined)
Allow Anonymous Access (Standard Modbus does not support auth)
Verify the TCP connection limit is not reached by active clients (SCADA/HMI); increase the limit if needed
